channel.title: Home on Alex Fernandes
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Alex Fernandes

item.title: About Me
item.description: Hello, I’m Alex My research interest are the following: Generative AI for randomised clinical trials Derived sheaf theory and microlocal analysis in persistence theory Education Diplôme de l’École Normale Supérieure : Major in Mathematics Minor in Molecular Biology MSc in Mathematics at Sorbonne University : Algebraic geometry and homotopy theory Computation of projected barcodes using free-resolutions (François Petit, Steve Oudot) Bsc in Mathematics at EPFL: Track : Algebra and Geometry Modular forms, theta series and even unimodular lattices (Maryna Viazovska) Let’s Connect I am always open to new opportunities and collaborations, feel free to reach out to me.

item.title: Legal Notice
item.description: Privacy Policy This website does not use cookies and do not collect or use any of your information. Theme This website was created with hugo and use the theme “Terminal” created by Nayan Seth available here
